title: Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern
summary: Persistent compiled wiki sits between raw sources and query-time reasoning; index and chronological log matter because knowledge should compound instead of being re-derived every query.

title: lucasastorian/llmwiki implementation
summary: Production implementation shows useful navigation ideas: path-based wiki tree, overview hub, log chronology, search/read/write MCP tools, citation rendering, and batch reads for broad navigation across many docs.
